headline: 3 Top Consumer Stocks Building Durable Growth
summary: These high-performing brands are showing resilience and solid growth potential in a challenging economic environment.

headline: Is Tapestry’s (TPR) Digital Surge in China Outweighing Valuation Concerns and Insider Selling?
summary: In recent days, Tapestry reported strong third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, with direct-to-consumer revenue up 23% and digital sales rising 25%, supported by especially strong digital-driven growth in Greater China. At the same time, external research providers flagged the shares as significantly overvalued and disclosed roughly US$6.40 million of insider share sales over the past three months. While some valuation models now suggest Tapestry’s stock price is well above estimated intrinsic...
